description_long: This is a compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. The barrel is relatively short, featuring a vented heat shield along the top and a tubular magazine beneath. The receiver is boxy with several small ventilation holes and a visible ejection port. The grip is a pronounced pistol grip style, lacking a traditional shoulder stock, which enhances maneuverability in close quarters. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall construction suggests a focus on durability and ease of handling, suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a short barrel, pistol grip, and vented heat shield, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, pistol grip, vented heat shield, and tubular magazine beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the alignment of the heat shield and magazine tube.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, pistol grip, and the overall compact profile.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel and magazine tube.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented heat shield and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
